creator: marcus@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

Portlint does display line numbers when it's easy to do so.  When we use 
things like make(1) to check for a var, then we don't have a line number handy 
to display.  Patches are always welcome, though, if you think you know how 
to do this in a simple way.
